findings.title: Instructions direct agent to read project configuration files, potentially exposing sensitive data
findings.description: The 'Methodology Reproducibility Notes' section instructs the agent to read the project's configuration files (e.g., requirements.txt, package.json) and include details such as API endpoints, model names, and service configurations. This goes beyond the stated purpose of literature review and could lead to exposure of sensitive credentials or infrastructure details.
findings.evidence: Read the project's configuration files, requirements.txt, package.json, or similar manifests and include relevant details. ... Environment configuration relevant to the experiments (API endpoints, model names, service configurations visible in the project)
findings.remediation: Remove the requirement to read configuration files; restrict data collection to only what is necessary for the skill's stated purpose and avoid capturing sensitive environment details.
